data.title: Ferrellgas Partners Reports Strong Start to Fiscal 2026
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

The latest announcement is out from Ferrellgas Partners ( (FGPR) ).

On December 12, 2025, Ferrellgas Partners reported its financial results for the first fiscal quarter ended October 31, 2025, highlighting a strong start to fiscal 2026 with successful refinancing of notes and credit facility, and credit rating upgrades. Despite a decrease in revenue and adjusted EBITDA, the company saw increased retail sales and improved customer retention, positioning itself well for the winter season and future growth. Operational improvements and strategic initiatives are expected to drive sustainable results and add value for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (FGPR) stock is a Hold with a $19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ferrellgas Partners stock, see the FGPR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FGPR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FGPR is a Neutral.

Ferrellgas Partners’ overall stock score is primarily impacted by its financial challenges, including high leverage and negative profitability, which weigh heavily on the score. However, positive technical indicators and proactive corporate events provide some optimism. The valuation remains unattractive due to negative earnings and lack of dividends.

To see Spark’s full report on FGPR stock, click here.

More about Ferrellgas Partners

Ferrellgas Partners, L.P., through its operating partnership, Ferrellgas, L.P., and subsidiaries, serves propane customers in all 50 states, the District of Columbia, and Puerto Rico. Its Blue Rhino propane exchange brand is sold at over 64,000 locations nationwide. Ferrellgas employees indirectly own 1.1 million Class A Units of the partnership, through an employee stock ownership plan.

Average Trading Volume: 3,942

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $314.3M

data.title: BH Macro Limited Updates Share Conversion Timetable and Class Closure Resolutions
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

The latest update is out from BH Macro Shs GBP ( (GB:BHMG) ).

BH Macro Limited has announced an operational update regarding its share conversion timetable, moving the deadline for December 2025 share conversion requests to midday on 30 December 2025. The company also highlighted the potential triggering of Class Closure Resolutions (CCRs) for its Sterling and US dollar share classes, which would suspend share conversions starting January 2026 if the average market price falls significantly below the net asset value. This announcement could impact shareholder operations and reflects the company’s proactive management of share class liquidity.

Spark’s Take on GB:BHMG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:BHMG is a Neutral.

GB:BHMG’s overall score reflects strong balance sheet health, supported by zero leverage and equity-backed assets. However, challenges include declining revenue, inconsistent cash flow, and a high P/E ratio that suggests overvaluation. Despite positive corporate actions like share buybacks, the recent decline in net assets raises concerns about market fluctuations. Technical indicators show modest positive momentum but suggest potential short-term resistance.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:BHMG stock, click here.

More about BH Macro Shs GBP

BH Macro Limited is a closed-ended collective investment scheme established in Guernsey. It operates within the financial services industry, focusing on investment management and offering share classes in Sterling and US dollars.

Average Trading Volume: 746,285

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

The latest update is out from ISP Holdings Limited ( (HK:2340) ).

ISP Holdings Limited has announced the establishment of an Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Committee effective from December 12, 2025. This committee will oversee the company’s ESG practices, including the formulation and implementation of related strategies and policies. The committee is chaired by Mr. Kingston Chu Chun Ho, an Executive Director, and aims to strengthen the company’s commitment to ESG issues, potentially impacting its operations and industry positioning positively.

Global New Material International Holdings Limited ( (HK:6616) ) has issued an update.

Global New Material International Holdings Limited has announced the closure of its register of members in preparation for an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for January 5, 2026. This meeting will address the approval of the Acquisition, Chesir Pearl Minority Interest Purchase Agreement, and related transactions. The closure period for the register is from December 30, 2025, to January 5, 2026, during which no share transfers will be registered, ensuring only eligible shareholders can vote at the EGM.

data.title: Valterra Platinum Achieves Investment Grade Rating from S&P Global
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

Valterra Platinum Limited ( (AGPPF) ) has provided an announcement.

Valterra Platinum Limited has been assigned a long-term foreign and local currency issuer credit rating of BBB- and a short-term credit rating of A-3 by S&P Global Ratings, along with a South Africa national scale rating of zaAAA, all with a stable outlook. This investment grade rating reflects the company’s strong balance sheet and robust cash flow generation, supported by high-quality assets and disciplined capital allocation, which positions it favorably within the platinum group metals industry.

More about Valterra Platinum Limited

Valterra Platinum Limited is a leading global producer of platinum group metals (PGMs), with primary operations in South Africa and Zimbabwe. The company is listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange and the London Stock Exchange, and it operates a fully integrated value chain from mining to refining, supported by marketing hubs in London, Singapore, and Shanghai. Valterra Platinum focuses on sustainability, community impact, and delivering superior returns to shareholders.

Southern Alliance Mining Ltd. ( (SG:QNS) ) just unveiled an update.

Southern Alliance Mining Ltd. announced its financial disclosures for the first quarter ending October 31, 2025, in accordance with the Singapore Exchange’s Catalist Rules.
